llmResponse.agenda_changes: No formal changes announced. However, the board discussed modifications to the superintendent search timeline during the Superintendent Search Process discussion item, including adjustments to survey dates (moved from week of October 13 to week of October 20) and stakeholder input dates (October 20-23).
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: There are no action items, so now we'll move on to the discussion items
